subject: [AAF][SMS] v1.16+ compatible templates
commit_message:
[AAF][SMS] v1.16+ compatible templates

Use the different "common" templates in order to create consistent and
v1.16+ compatible templates for the different resources of AAF

Issue-ID: OOM-1971
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>
Change-Id: I7864bdfea521a7749b1c26290ec8189437710c8c

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.
